title: dombeya selinala
intro: Dombeya selinala, also known as the Pink Wild Pear, is a plant species native to tropical Africa that belongs to the family Sterculiaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits associated with Dombeya selinala include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Dombeya selinala include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, tonics, and other medicinal products.
